summary: David, you're at 253.1 pounds this week, which means you've lost an impressive 61.9 pounds total since starting—that's nearly a fifth of your starting weight. Your consistency is showing: even though the scale moved just 1.1 pounds over the last two weeks, you're maintaining a steady 0.55 pounds per week, which is exactly the kind of sustainable pace that leads to lasting results. I noticed you logged 11 days this period, so let's aim for complete tracking next week—those gaps in data can make it harder to spot patterns that help you optimize. You're doing the hard work and it's paying off; keep trusting the process.
